commands.review_summary:
The branch updates Windows QMD shim/package fallback resolution, adds guarded URL-backed OpenAI-compatible image parsing/downloads plus SDK docs/export, and currently changes the root dependency graph and two instruction symlink modes.

PR surface: Source +242, Tests +350, Docs 0, Config +1, Generated 0, Other +724. Total +1317 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main only parses `b64_json` image entries and only resolves quoted `%~dp0` Windows shim entrypoints, while the PR proof exercises a quoted absolute QMD shim and URL-backed image generation. I did not run the failing current-main paths in this read-only review.
